prompt: Create a gritty ultra-wide cinematic fashion photograph of a young goth woman standing close to the camera in the center foreground, shot from a low angle with an extreme wide-angle lens. Her face is completely obscured by a large centered square censor block in a soft brown skin-tone gradient, covering the entire face from forehead to chin. She has messy long black hair blowing around her shoulders and wears a black lace gothic top with sheer floral sleeves, a high lace choker collar, layered dark necklaces, and a moody alternative style. Place her in front of towering ruined Gothic cathedral walls covered in bright graffiti, with pointed arches and broken stonework rising dramatically behind her. Use a saturated deep blue sky, harsh contrast, crushed shadows, vivid reds, yellows, blues, and pinks in the graffiti, high-grain street-photography texture, slightly distorted perspective, intense sunlight, dramatic color grading, and a rebellious punk editorial atmosphere. Compose in a 16:9 horizontal frame, subject centered, ruins filling the background, no readable text, no watermark.
